curriculum_warnings: Duplicate romanization in Dependent Vowels: ['am', 'e'] (acceptable for distinct Khmer glyphs)
Dependent Vowels unit description claims 24 vowels but list contains 23 entries
Duplicate romanization in Main Consonants: ['tha', 'tho'] (acceptable for distinct Khmer glyphs)
Duplicate romanization in Sub Consonants: ['sub tha', 'sub tho'] (acceptable for distinct Khmer glyphs)
